mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCTS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_REVIEWS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_MEMBERS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE IMAGE_STATUS = 'found'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE IMAGE_URL IS NULL OR IMAGE_STATUS IS NULL OR IMAGE_STATUS != 'found'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT MEMBER_ID) FROM BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS WHERE FACE_ENABLED = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS WHERE IS_VISIBLE = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS WHERE EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS WHERE IS_FEATURED = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(RATING), 2), 0) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS WHERE EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'DETAIL_VIEW') AND CREATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 7
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_COMMENT_REPORTS WHERE STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT PLATFORM AS platform, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM BL_PRODUCTS GROUP BY PLATFORM ORDER BY PLATFORM
SELECT BASE_SKIN_TYPE AS skinType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE BASE_SKIN_TYPE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY BASE_SKIN_TYPE ORDER BY BASE_SKIN_TYPE
SELECT SENTIMENT_LABEL AS sentimentLabel, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM BL_REVIEWS WHERE SENTIMENT_LABEL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SENTIMENT_LABEL ORDER BY SENTIMENT_LABEL
SELECT CAUTION_LEVEL AS cautionLevel, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM BL_PRODUCTS WHERE CAUTION_LEVEL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CAUTION_LEVEL ORDER BY CAUTION_LEVEL
